name: KYC Anomaly Detector to reduce fraud loss
description: KYC Anomaly Detector to reduce fraud loss clears orders and reconciles positions; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via Treasury to lower chargebacks.

steps.name: Transaction Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize alerts from Fraud Platform; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Program Synthesis
steps.description: Execute program synthesis phase for the CodeAct pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Execution
steps.description: Execute execution phase for the CodeAct pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Case Management
steps.description: Case Management across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Break Resolution
steps.description: Break Resolution across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Settlement
steps.description: Settlement across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Sanctions Screening
steps.description: Sanctions Screening across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Regulatory Report
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to Core Banking; return response JSON for the client.
